rulings.Case Title: BERNICE CHUNE et al VS. EUGENE CHUNE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Referee Richard J. Wall'S Motion Confirming Referee'S Report
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 6 - Referee Richard J. Wall'S Motion Confirming Referee's Report. Deny, no information provided re: delivery of unit vacant immediately or at close of escrow in declaration. No points and authorities. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LOUIS GAMACHE et al VS. NICK VOLENTE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Joinder) In Motion Of Defts To Approve Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFFs PAUL GARRARD, DANIELLE MCGEE, BRETT STAFFORD, KOICHI MATSUDA, BARBARA BRADSHAW and SANSANEE SAEJEAR's Joinder in Motion Of Defendants To Approve Good Faith Settlement. Plaintiffs' Motion to Approve Good Faith Settlement is GRANTED.=(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SHEK VS. ANGELA CHAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Judgment Or Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFFs JOHN SHEK, A.R.R.T.'s Motion For Relief From Judgment Or Order. Plaintiff's Motion for Relief from Judgment is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to carry his burden and failed to show mistake, inadvertence or excusable neglect. Additionally, Plaintiff failed to submit a proposed response to OSC. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KARINE JARDIN VS. GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANTs GOUGH STREET APARTMENTS, LLC, PETER LEE and GORDON LEE's Motion To Compel. Defendants' Motion to Compel. Hearing required to address Plaintiff's ability to be present at trial testify at trial, and represent herself in light of her inability to sit for deposition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. WILLIAM S. COLEMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injuction To Enjoin Defendants From Selling The Property At Trustees Sale
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 4 - PLAINTIFF THERESA MURPHY's Motion For Preliminary Injuction To Enjoin Defendants From Selling The Property At Trustees Sale. Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Moving party failed to provide valid proofs of service of service of summons and motion for preliminary injunction on defendants. William Coleman and PRO30 FUNDING were purportedly served via Secretary of State without Court's leave. Bank of New York Melon, was purportedly served via "Anthony Mancuso, Authorized to Accept Service," no evidence of such authority is provided. No proof of service of summons and complaint on MERS on file. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: THERESA LYNNE MURPHY VS. WILLIAM S. COLEMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Notice Of Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 4 - PLAINTIFF THERESA MURPHY's Motion For Notice Of Pendency Of Action. Plaintiff's Motion for Notice of Pendency of Action is GRANTED. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD JUNG VS. HON LAM YEUNG
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 13, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT HON YEUNG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to state which provision of "Commercial Lease Agreement" was breached, how it was breached, and what the damages are. =(501/ar)
